permissions.fallback_msg: The PDF skill needs to read PDF files and related documents from your workspace. Allow this operation?
The PDF skill needs to write output files (merged PDFs, split pages, created PDFs, extracted tables, encrypted files, watermarked documents) to your workspace. Allow this operation?
The PDF skill needs to run command-line tools such as pdftotext, qpdf, pdftk, and pdfimages to process PDF documents. Allow this operation?
The PDF skill may need to install Python packages (pypdf, pdfplumber, reportlab, pytesseract, pdf2image, pandas) or system tools (poppler-utils, pdftk). Allow this operation?
The PDF skill needs to load additional instruction files (forms.md, reference.md) to complete certain operations such as form filling. Allow this operation?
